name: A.S.M. Golf Academy
about: A.S.M. Golf Academy is an indoor golf training facility focused on providing in-depth swing and mental game training. The facility is designed for golfers seeking expert guidance, offering memberships with flexible hours and private instruction from a PGA professional. Located in a compact space, they emphasize making a significant impact on player performance through structured practice and personalized coaching.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Foresight GC Falcon simulator technology for detailed ball and club tracking
Flexible membership structure to accommodate various practice needs
Personalized coaching from a PGA professional with over 10,000 lessons taught
Exclusive events and training aids available for members

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service provided. BYOB status unclear.
No information on alcohol service provided. BYOB status unclear.

simulator_hardware.notes: Three bays equipped with GC Falcon technology for ball/club data and course play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no information on-site about outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for 18-hole rounds, but it offers flexible booking options for practice sessions.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior coaching programs and is suitable for youth golfers.
